title: BackupConfig
description: S3-compatible backup configuration. Credentials are resolved from environment variables only — never stored in this file.

schedule.description: Cron schedule for automatic backups (default: daily at 04:00 UTC)

retention_days.description: Number of days to retain backups before pruning

encryption.description: Encrypt backups with age (requires HOOP_BACKUP_AGE_KEY env var)
